subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! With utmost longing and yearning did I call thee to mind and set forth to pen this letter. If thou but knewest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب قدیم با کمال شوق و اشتیاق بیاد تو افتادم تا این نامه بنگارم اگر بدانی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
